metadata.preview:
# Auth refresh queue rationale
session_id: auth_refresh_session
title: Auth refresh queue rationale

## message auth_fact_1
The rejected design was one global mutex around all auth refresh work.

## message auth_fact_2
The global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.

## message auth_fact_3
RefreshQueue in src/auth/queue.ts uses a per-tenant key. The complete rationale is that same-tenant duplicate refresh requests coalesce into one refresh, while different tenants continue in parallel.

## message auth_fact_4
The rollback flag FLAG_AUTH_QUEUE_ROLLBACK exists, but the flag is not the reason for per-tenant dedupe.

parts.text: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so same-tenant duplicate refresh requests coalesce into one refresh while unrelated tenants can still refresh in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"auth_refresh_session.md","message_id":"auth_fact_3"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex was rejected because unrelated tenants must not block each other, as shown by auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing retry global mutex","markdown parser docs cleanup","FLAG_AUTH_QUEUE_ROLLBACK"]}
